D4 Colorimetry L4 Analyze Reference

The RGB Cube into XYZ

slide the transform and watch the unit RGB cube shear into the parallelepiped that XYZ occupies

A 3×3 matrix is a linear map: it sends the straight edges of the RGB cube to straight edges, but stretches, shears, and rotates the whole shape into a parallelepiped.

The corners are coloured by their RGB value. Slide from the identity (a plain cube) toward the sRGB-to-XYZ matrix and watch the cube tilt and skew into the slanted box that linear sRGB carves out of XYZ.
